scripts.prebuild: node scripts/merge-app-i18n.mjs && node scripts/enrich-en-seo.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemaps.mjs && node scripts/generate-icons.mjs
scripts.build:pages: cp next.config.ts next.config.vercel.bak && cp next.config.pages.ts next.config.ts && next build && mv next.config.vercel.bak next.config.ts
